title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・Ever After

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo!
Go, Fine Motion!
You're the best!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
That was the best race ever!
Please keep running, Fine Motion!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Amazing... It's like the cheers are raining down on
me.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You ran incredibly, Fine. I almost started cheering
myself...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I may have lost, but I still had a lot of fun. It was a
wonderful race.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure everyone will be talking about today's
race for a long time to come.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
choice_data_list: You still have time, don't you?
You still have time, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
As long as I'm with you... I can run to the very
ends of the Earth!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Let's make the best memories we can until the
day we have to part!
